title: dianthus multisquameus
intro: Dianthus multisquameus, also known as the desert pink or fragrant pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus multisquameus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
